text: Planning a trip always fills me with excitement. Last year, I spent weeks researching destinations, booking flights, and creating a detailed itinerary. Finally, I arrived in Vietnam. I loved exploring new cultures—watching locals sell colourful fruits at morning markets and learning about ancient temples in Hanoi. The food was unforgettable; I tried steaming bowls of pho and crispy spring rolls, though I couldn’t always pronounce the names correctly. Language barriers were challenging at times, but smiling and pointing helped a lot. Now, looking back, I treasure every memory. These experiences taught me patience and opened my mind to different ways of living.
